Corporate Risk & Project Management
Corporate Risk & Project Management

Carte Noir Consulting provides exceptional management solutions that are customized to meet the unique needs of each of our clients in various sectors. Our team of highly skilled and knowledgeable specialists offers personalized training, guidance, and effective direction to help businesses enhance their process standards and ensure regulatory compliance.

Solutions

We believe in a collaborative approach, working closely with our clients to understand their unique challenges and objectives. This enables us to design a customized stratagem that will not only address current operational hurdles; but also position your business in a capable and adaptive state -- ready to effectively respond to emergent challenges and changes in the business landscape.

We are leaderS in Risk Management

Welcome

In today's rapidly evolving professional landscape, effectivity is an essential cornerstone for sustainable operations. As dedicated consultants, We bring an informed & holistic approach to project and risk management, underpinned by a thorough understanding of the intricate relationships between work processes, technology, risks, environmental stewardship, and human factors. With an unwavering commitment to fostering a culture of safe effectivity and a proven track record in risk mitigation, we believe that proactive risk management is pivotal not only in safeguarding the community but also in enhancing operational efficiency, building stakeholder trust, and securing an organization's reputation. Our mission is to assist you to encompass and improve the current fabric of your organizational processes; ensuring that every team member is able to safely execute to the best of their ability, and every project upholds the highest standards of legislative, environmental, and operational excellence.


Our Specialization

Every project presents new challenges and opportunities. Our team of seasoned Management, IT, and OHS experts are geared up to walk alongside you through each phase, ensuring the gears of your operations mesh smoothly while keeping safety at the forefront. We understand the language of the industry, the rhythm of schedules, and the psychology of people.

Our Projects

Critical Municipal Infrastructure Maintenance. Ransomware/Malware Attack Management. Residential High-Rise Curtain Wall Construction. Private Special Event Risk Mitigation. We've completed all projects with target key deliverables successfully achieved.

In response to our recommendations following a thorough penetration test Carte Noir was retained to implemented this secure on-premise custom server solution for BFR Gaming to exceed ISO 27001:2022 ISMS requirements.

BFR Gaming SerVEr - Toronto, ON

Our Team ensured the risks faced by Solid Rock Fabricating Co. Ltd. were effectively managed, while ironworkers completed intricate structural steel installations throughout this project.

THE BUTTERFLY - VANCOUVER, BC

Burrard Place - Vancouver, BC

Our Team successfully managed risks, provided an onsite OHS Officer, and completed training for Starline Windows while installers completed this curtain-wall leading edge glass installation throughout this 140,000 SF Commercial Project.
Our Team managed risks related to underwater confined-space procedures and a group lockout during this emergency project for Simon Fraser University. This involved multiple-location coordination between the City of Burnaby, SFU, and the General Contractor.

SFU Water Tower - Burnaby, BC

Our Team worked with Icon to manage risks during this iconic downtown High-Rise Project, providing First Aid attendants and assisting with labour management.

Vancouver House - Vancouver BC

Rolling Loud Music fESTIVAL - tORONTO, on

We ensured physical and human-related risks were identified and managed for Blue Feathers Records' Artists, during Rolling Loud Toronto 2022.

Years of successful work in the market

6

Testimonials

With Carte Noir, you can rest confidently knowing that all risk factors and obstacles to your project's successful completion will be duly accounted for and managed.
